title: Cool sayings — four catchphrases collected fall 2023
html:
Cool sayings — four catchphrases collected fall 2023

Source: 2023-10-23 Apple Note. Four lines, four taglines Yahir wanted to remember. Fits the same impulse as the names list and the meme name list — language-collection as raw material for brand voice and inside jokes.

TL;DR

  • "Your execution will be televised" — riff on Gil Scott-Heron's "the revolution will not be televised," inverted as a builder's challenge.
  • "Come and get me punk" — combative-bait phrase, possibly tagline material for a fighting/sports project.
  • "Gods of war, may your hammer be mighty" — invocational, fits the soul as beacon / mythic-mode register he reaches for in manifesto notes.
  • "It biblically states that I will kill you" — meme-formatted hyperbole, likely overheard from a friend/group chat.
  • Whole note is vibes-archive: phrases banked for future reuse in writing, captions, or product copy.

Pattern

This sits next to the late Dec meme name list and the July names list as part of the "collect raw verbal material" habit. Echoes the wrld brand suffix practice of treating language itself as project input.

Open questions

  • Which of these were originally his, vs. overheard? "Execution will be televised" feels coined.
  • Does any of this resurface later as a project tagline or social-post line?

Related

  • 2023 07 23 names
  • wrld brand suffix
  • soul as beacon
